name: Do These Violent Delights Have Violent Ends? Measuring the Post-Merge Fate of Agentic Code
summary: arXiv:2607.09902v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic coding tools are increasingly used to make autonomous repository-level changes to real-world projects. Prior work has largely evaluated the...
description: arXiv:2607.09902v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic coding tools are increasingly used to make autonomous repository-level changes to real-world projects. Prior work has largely evaluated these contributions at the pre-merge stage, through outcomes such as pull request acceptance and review effort. Far less is known about what happens to agentic code post-merge. Yet merge success alone do...
author: Chunqiu Steven Xia, Courtney Miller
